zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Metcalfe於1120年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親William Delaware Metcalfe25歲，母親Mary Kaherine Bennett25歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1165年在他的家鄉享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Metcalfe于1120年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲William Delaware Metcalfe25岁，母亲Mary Kaherine Bennett25岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1165年在他的家乡享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Metcalfe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Metcalf
meanings: English (Yorkshire): apparently a nickname from Middle English mete ‘meat, food’ + calf ‘calf’, i.e. ‘calf to be fattened up for eating’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Metcalfe was born in 1120, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Delaware Metcalfe, was 25 and his mother, Mary Kaherine Bennett, was 25. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1165, in his hometown, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Metcalfe est né en 1120, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Delaware Metcalfe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Kaherine Bennett, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1165, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Metcalfe 1120 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Delaware Metcalfe 25 und seine Mutter Mary Kaherine Bennett 25. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1165 im Alter von 45 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Metcalfe è nato il nel 1120 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Delaware Metcalfe, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mary Kaherine Bennett, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1165, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Metcalfeが1120年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Delaware Metcalfeは25歳，母Mary Kaherine Bennettは25歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1165年に故郷で45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Metcalfe(이)가 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Delaware Metcalfe(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Kaherine Bennett(은)는 25세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1165년 그의 고향에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Metcalfe nasceu em 1120, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Delaware Metcalfe, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Kaherine Bennett, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1165, em sua cidade natal, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Metcalfe родился в 1120 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Delaware Metcalfe было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Kaherine Bennett, 25. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1165 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Metcalfe nació en 1120, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Delaware Metcalfe, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mary Kaherine Bennett, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1165, en su pueblo, a la edad de 45 años.
